recommendations.title: Lesson of the Evil
recommendations.overview: Seiji Hasumi is a popular English teacher in a private high school. He is also a violent and sociopathic killer who concocts an extreme plan to deal with the rise of bullying and bad behavior among the student body.

recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: At a high school senior prom, a masked killer stalks four teenagers who were responsible for the accidental death of a classmate six years prior.

recommendations.title: Hello Mary Lou: Prom Night II
recommendations.overview: When Hamilton High’s Prom Queen of 1957, Mary Lou Maloney is killed by her jilted boyfriend, she comes back for revenge thirty years later.

recommendations.title: He's All That
recommendations.overview: To get revenge on her ex-boyfriend, an influencer attempts to transform an unpopular classmate into prom king.

recommendations.title: Art of Love
recommendations.overview: After learning that the art thief she has been chasing is her ex-lover, an officer working for Interpol concocts a plan to catch him red-handed.

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: Fear Street: Prom Queen
recommendations.overview: Who will be voted queen at Shadyside High's 1988 prom? For underdog Lori, competition is cutthroat even before someone starts killing off the candidates.

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.

recommendations.title: Argo
recommendations.overview: As the Iranian revolution reaches a boiling point, a CIA 'exfiltration' specialist concocts a risky plan to free six Americans who have found shelter at the home of the Canadian ambassador.

recommendations.title: Grosse Pointe Blank
recommendations.overview: Hitman Martin Blank becomes a moving target after he rebuffs a fellow assassin's invitation to form a union. On the advice of his quirky assistant and neurotic psychiatrist, Martin begrudgingly heads out to Grosse Pointe, Michigan for his ten-year hi
